creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 212194
onefetch-2.2.2.diff

Command-line tool that displays information
about your Git repository directly on your
terminal, supporting almost 50 different
programming languages.

WWW: https://github.com/o2sh/onefetch

Testing:
   * No errors reported with portlint, built in Poudriere and
     application works as expected (logs attached).
